Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
James A. Quadra (415-426-3502) of Quadra and Coli for Plaintiff/opposing party Pamela Wiget.
Stephen K. Lightfoot II (415-945-9998) of Lightfoot Law Firm for Defendant/Moving party 2195 GREEN STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSO.
Gabriella Guitierrez Court reporter, CSR 024 of Hannah Kaufman & Associates, Inc. (415-337-2077).

Hearing is held. Both sides ARGUED re: Settlement Agreement from CGC-87-881134; HOA's responsibility to pay for deck, roof and building code upgrades; and granting access to garage (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT 2195 GREEN STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSO's Motion To Amend The Terms Of A Judgment Or Alternatively Enforce And Carry Out The Terms Of A Judgment is taken under submission. Mr. Lightfoot to provide copy of cited case to other side and court. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S.
